diagrams.title: Contract Types Risk Matrix
diagrams.description: Shows risk distribution between client and vendor for different contract types
diagrams.purpose: Understand which party bears more risk in each contract type to make informed selection

diagrams.title: Contract Lifecycle Flow
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing phases from contract initiation to termination/renewal
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete journey of a contract and understand ongoing management requirements

diagrams.title: SLA Compliance Dashboard
diagrams.description: Traffic light visualization of SLA metrics and compliance status
diagrams.purpose: Understand how vendor performance is measured and visualized against agreed standards

diagrams.title: Change Request Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process for handling contract modifications
diagrams.purpose: Understand formal process for managing scope changes while maintaining contract integrity
